ar.err.not_found: No SwitchBot BLE device matched the provided mac_address.
ar.err.ambiguous_target: Multiple SwitchBot BLE devices matched the provided device_name.
ar.err.invalid_argument: Either mac_address or device_name is required.
ar.err.value_required: The value field is required for set_value.
ar.err.invalid_value_range: The value field must be between 0 and 100.
ar.err.invalid_value_type: The value field must be an integer.
ar.err.unsupported_device: The matched device does not look like a SwitchBot BLE device.
ar.tool.description: Control a nearby SwitchBot BLE device and return a JSON or text result.
ar.param.devname.description: Optional device name filter. Matches by exact name or substring.
ar.param.value.description: Optional numeric value for set_value actions. Range: 0-100.
ar.err.no_writable_characteristic: The device did not expose a writable GATT characteristic suitable for control.
ar.err.bleak_missing:
Error: 'bleak' library is not installed. Please install it using:
pip install bleak
ar.err.linux_permission:
Error during BLE operation: {err_msg}

[Linux/Raspberry Pi Permission Guide]
You might lack permissions to access the Bluetooth socket. Try one of the following:
1. Add your user to the bluetooth group (recommended):
   sudo usermod -aG bluetooth $USER
   (Requires restart or re-login)
2. Grant permissions directly to the Python binary:
   sudo setcap 'cap_net_raw,cap_net_admin+eip' $(readlink -f $(which python))
ar.err.macos_permission:
Error during BLE operation: {err_msg}

[macOS Permission Guide]
Bluetooth access might have been denied by macOS security restrictions.
Please open 'System Settings > Privacy & Security > Bluetooth' and ensure your terminal, VS Code, or Python process is allowed to access Bluetooth.

nb.err.value_required: The value field is required for set_value.
nb.err.invalid_value_range: The value field must be between 0 and 100.
nb.err.invalid_value_type: The value field must be an integer.
nb.err.unsupported_device: The matched device does not look like a SwitchBot BLE device.
nb.tool.description: Control a nearby SwitchBot BLE device and return a JSON or text result.
nb.param.devname.description: Optional device name filter. Matches by exact name or substring.
nb.param.value.description: Optional numeric value for set_value actions. Range: 0-100.
nb.err.no_writable_characteristic: The device did not expose a writable GATT characteristic suitable for control.
nb.err.bleak_missing:
Error: 'bleak' library is not installed. Please install it using:
pip install bleak
nb.err.linux_permission:
Error during BLE operation: {err_msg}

[Linux/Raspberry Pi Permission Guide]
You might lack permissions to access the Bluetooth socket. Try one of the following:
1. Add your user to the bluetooth group (recommended):
   sudo usermod -aG bluetooth $USER
   (Requires restart or re-login)
2. Grant permissions directly to the Python binary:
   sudo setcap 'cap_net_raw,cap_net_admin+eip' $(readlink -f $(which python))
nb.err.macos_permission:
Error during BLE operation: {err_msg}

[macOS Permission Guide]
Bluetooth access might have been denied by macOS security restrictions.
Please open 'System Settings > Privacy & Security > Bluetooth' and ensure your terminal, VS Code, or Python process is allowed to access Bluetooth.
